ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: [🧪 Experimental] This will make the order of bookmarks in the sidebar reflect the order the bookmark-cycling command will move through files. (Note that this feature only works for bookmarks that are not in a folder.)
ast.target: [🧪 实验性] 这将使侧边栏中书签的顺序反映书签循环命令遍历文件的顺序。（请注意，此功能仅适用于不在文件夹中的书签。）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Auto-sort items in bookmark sidebar by last modified time
ast.target: 按最后修改时间自动排序书签侧边栏中的项目
